creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/www/firefox-esr/#conflicts> notes the conflict with firefox. This was probably established around eleven years ago; <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/dc2a4ea72edb2e2e08bc06a516860261c113e230> … 

Triage: reduce severity to the norm for a feature request.
